title: Roblox in minecraft (alpha)
description: this is a project that adds items from ROBLOX like the swords from S.F.O.T.H
body: a mod that adds sword fight on the heights swords from roblox to the game, the venomshank, firebrand, darkheart, the ice dagger, ilumina and windforce. use right click to use abilitys and all the swords have custom effects, this is my first modding project so sorry if stuff seems unpolished, this mod is still in development ( P.S sorry, but i lost the modding file so the mod is discontinued! thanks for the (NON-EXISTANT) support!
